category: cam tablo / glass wall art / tempered glass print
style: yuksek cozunurluk fotograf baski temperli cam uzerine UV print, parlak finish, modern dekorasyon, sahne/manzara/soyut/figuratif, ev ve ofis duvar dekoru, ahsap arka panel + askI aparati dahil
targetAudience: Turkiye'de ev sahipleri, ofis dekoratorleri, mimari/ic mimari musterileri, dugun ve tasinma hediyesi alanlar, modern dekor sevenler, kafe/restoran sahipleri
designPromptExtra: Design must be a high-resolution photographic or fine-art print suitable for UV printing on tempered glass. Vivid colors, sharp detail, balanced composition, suitable for indoor home/office wall display. No text overlays unless reference dictates. No metal silhouette, no flat single-color cutouts, no fabric textures. Output should be print-ready full-color image, aspect ratio matching reference (default 2:3 portrait or 3:2 landscape).
descriptionVoice: modern, sicak, dekoratif vurgulu, urun kalitesi (temperli cam, UV baski, askI aparati) on plana cikarilir, ev/ofis kullanim alanlari belirtilir, hediye onerisi yapilir; asla apparel, kumas, metal tablo veya kanvas referansi vermez
